etymology.description: 母(母) (mǔ, "woman") + 子(子) (zǐ, "child") = a woman giving birth to a child -> original form of 育(育)
etymology.interpretation: The pictogram represents the concept of giving birth, with 母(母) symbolizing the mother and 子(子) the child, depicting the act of a woman giving birth. This directly leads to the meanings associated with birth and care of offspring.
